%% SAMPLE — hand-written stand-in for scitex-clew's emitted 00_shared/clew_rendered.tex.
%% NOT generated by scitex-writer. It mirrors the CONTRACT documented in
%% 00_shared/latex_styles/clew_presentation.tex so the writer RENDERER can be
%% host-compiled before clew ships its generator. Values are neurovista's real
%% claims as a 4-state mix (verified / suspect / unverified / exception),
%% LaTeX-escaped as clew would emit.
\makeatletter

%% --- palette (clew owns this; writer has \providecolor fallbacks) ---
%% 4-state palette (prototype hex; clew v1.3 emits the real values, overriding).
\definecolor{clewVerified}{HTML}{2E7D32}
\definecolor{clewSuspect}{HTML}{F9A825}
\definecolor{clewUnverified}{HTML}{C62828}
\definecolor{clewException}{HTML}{6A1B9A}

%% --- aggregate ---
\def\clew@total{8}
\def\clew@verified{5}
\def\clew@allverified{0}

%% --- per-claim data (id sanitized to [a-zA-Z0-9]) ---
%% abstract_strongest_patients [verified]
\@namedef{clew@val@abstractstrongestpatients}{strongest patients: P03 AUC 0.82, P13 0.71, P11 0.66}
\@namedef{clew@hex@abstractstrongestpatients}{2E7D32}
\@namedef{clew@status@abstractstrongestpatients}{verified}

%% results_prospective_repro [verified]
\@namedef{clew@val@resultsprospectiverepro}{13/15 reproduce prospectively; exact binomial p=0.0037; permutation p=0.0045}
\@namedef{clew@hex@resultsprospectiverepro}{2E7D32}
\@namedef{clew@status@resultsprospectiverepro}{verified}

%% results_window_descriptor [verified]
\@namedef{clew@val@resultswindowdescriptor}{304-dim window descriptor = 19 PAC features $\times$ 16 channels}
\@namedef{clew@hex@resultswindowdescriptor}{2E7D32}
\@namedef{clew@status@resultswindowdescriptor}{verified}

%% results_seizure_auc [verified]
\@namedef{clew@val@resultsseizureauc}{seizure-level AUC cohort-mean \textasciitilde0.58 at k=5--10, \textasciitilde0.44 at k=304}
\@namedef{clew@hex@resultsseizureauc}{2E7D32}
\@namedef{clew@status@resultsseizureauc}{verified}

%% results_perpatient_auc [verified]
\@namedef{clew@val@resultsperpatientauc}{per-patient median prospective ROC-AUC 0.651, 11/15 $>$0.60}
\@namedef{clew@hex@resultsperpatientauc}{2E7D32}
\@namedef{clew@status@resultsperpatientauc}{verified}

%% methods_sequential_predictor [suspect -> suspect/amber color]
\@namedef{clew@val@methodssequentialpredictor}{sequential predictor: 1452 held-out scores/arm; cohort-mean repro clinical\_only 0.686, plus\_sle 0.626}
\@namedef{clew@hex@methodssequentialpredictor}{F9A825}
\@namedef{clew@status@methodssequentialpredictor}{suspect}

%% discussion_effect_sizes [exception -> exception color]
\@namedef{clew@val@discussioneffectsizes}{effect sizes small (within Cliff's $|\delta|<$0.147); Spearman $+$0.21}
\@namedef{clew@hex@discussioneffectsizes}{6A1B9A}
\@namedef{clew@status@discussioneffectsizes}{exception}

%% table1_event_completion [UNVERIFIED — stale v4i] -> RED
\@namedef{clew@val@table1eventcompletion}{Table 1 --- per-patient event completion}
\@namedef{clew@hex@table1eventcompletion}{C62828}
\@namedef{clew@status@table1eventcompletion}{unverified}

\makeatother
%% EOF
